name: Gibson Assembly

components.name: 1. 设计引物 (15-25 bp 重叠区)
3. 冰上配制反应: Master Mix + DNA 片段

notes.en: Seamless, scarless DNA assembly. Joins 2-6 fragments with 15-25 bp overlaps in a single isothermal reaction. No restriction enzymes or ligase needed separately — T5 exonuclease, Phusion polymerase, and Taq ligase work together in one tube.
notes.zh: 无缝无疤 DNA 组装。通过 15-25 bp 重叠区在单一等温反应中连接 2-6 个片段。无需单独使用限制酶或连接酶——T5 外切酶、Phusion 聚合酶和 Taq 连接酶在同一管中协同工作。

ref: Gibson et al. (2009) Nat Methods 6:343–345; NEB Protocol E5510 (protocols.io doi:10.17504/protocols.io.bdddi226)

usage.en: Assemble multiple DNA fragments seamlessly using Gibson isothermal assembly.
usage.zh: Gibson 等温组装法无缝连接多个 DNA 片段。

briefSteps.en: Design primers with 15–30 bp overlapping homology arms, PCR-amplify and gel-purify all fragments, mix fragments with Gibson Assembly Master Mix on ice (2:1 to 5:1 insert:vector molar ratio), incubate at 50°C for 15–60 min, chill on ice, then transform 2 µL into competent cells.
briefSteps.zh: 设计含 15–30 bp 重叠同源臂的引物，PCR 扩增并凝胶纯化所有片段，冰上将片段与 Gibson Assembly Master Mix 混合（insert:vector 摩尔比 2:1 至 5:1），50°C 孵育 15–60 min，冰上冷却，取 2 µL 转化感受态细胞。

detailedSteps.en: Design primers for all fragments using NEBuilder (nebuilder.neb.com) or manually. Each junction requires 15–30 bp overlapping homology (20–25 bp recommended). The overlap Tm should be ≥48°C. For 2-fragment assemblies, 15 bp overlaps are sufficient; for ≥4 fragments, use 25–30 bp overlaps.
detailedSteps.zh: 使用 NEBuilder（nebuilder.neb.com）或手动设计所有片段引物。每个连接处需要 15–30 bp 重叠同源区（推荐 20–25 bp）。重叠区 Tm 应 ≥48°C。2 片段组装 15 bp 重叠即可；≥4 片段建议使用 25–30 bp 重叠。

detailedSteps.en: PCR-amplify each fragment using a high-fidelity polymerase (Q5 or Phusion). Purify PCR products by column purification or gel extraction. Quantify each fragment by NanoDrop.
detailedSteps.zh: 使用高保真聚合酶（Q5 或 Phusion）PCR 扩增每个片段。通过柱纯化或凝胶回收纯化 PCR 产物。NanoDrop 定量每个片段。

detailedSteps.en: Linearize the vector backbone by restriction digest or PCR (inverse PCR). Purify and quantify. Ensure the vector has compatible ends with the first and last insert fragments.
detailedSteps.zh: 通过限制酶酶切或 PCR（反向 PCR）线性化载体骨架。纯化并定量。确保载体末端与第一个和最后一个插入片段兼容。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate DNA amounts: use a 2:1 to 5:1 molar ratio of insert to vector. Recommended: 50–200 ng total DNA per 20 µL reaction, with vector at 50–100 ng. For a 2-fragment assembly: use 0.03–0.2 pmol of each fragment.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算 DNA 用量：insert 与 vector 摩尔比为 2:1 至 5:1。推荐每 20 µL 反应总 DNA 50–200 ng，载体 50–100 ng。对于 2 片段组装：每种片段用量为 0.03–0.2 pmol。

detailedSteps.en: Set up Gibson Assembly reaction on ice: mix 10 µL 2× Gibson Assembly Master Mix (contains T5 exonuclease, Phusion polymerase, Taq ligase), the appropriate volume of each DNA fragment, and nuclease-free water to 20 µL total. Mix gently.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰上配制 Gibson 组装反应：混合 10 µL 2× Gibson Assembly Master Mix（含 T5 外切酶、Phusion 聚合酶、Taq 连接酶）、各 DNA 片段适量及无核酸酶水至总体积 20 µL。轻柔混匀。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate reaction at 50°C for 15 min (2 fragments) to 60 min (3–6 fragments) in a thermocycler. For assemblies with >4 fragments or fragments >6 kb, extend incubation to 60 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 在热循环仪中 50°C 孵育：2 片段孵育 15 min，3–6 片段孵育 60 min。超过 4 个片段或片段 >6 kb 时延长孵育至 60 min。

detailedSteps.en: Place reaction on ice immediately after incubation. Transform 2 µL of the assembly reaction into 25–50 µL chemically competent E. coli. Heat-shock at 42°C for 30 s. Recover in 950 µL SOC at 37°C for 1 hour with shaking.
detailedSteps.zh: 孵育结束后立即置于冰上。取 2 µL 组装产物转化 25–50 µL 化学感受态大肠杆菌。42°C 热激 30 s。在 950 µL SOC 中 37°C 振荡恢复 1 小时。

detailedSteps.en: Plate 100 µL onto LB agar + antibiotic plates. Incubate at 37°C overnight (16–18 hours). Screen colonies by colony PCR using primers flanking the junction sites.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 100 µL 涂布于含抗生素 LB 平板。37°C 过夜培育（16–18 小时）。用跨越连接位点的引物进行菌落 PCR 筛选。

detailedSteps.en: Perform miniprep on positive colonies. Verify correct assembly by Sanger sequencing across all junction regions and throughout the entire insert.
detailedSteps.zh: 对阳性菌落进行质粒小提。通过 Sanger 测序验证所有连接区域及整个插入片段的正确组装。

note.en: Completed Gibson Assembly reaction can be stored on ice for up to 1 hour, or at −20°C for up to 1 week before transformation.
note.zh: 完成的 Gibson 组装反应可在冰上保存最多 1 小时，或在 −20°C 保存最多 1 周再进行转化。
